title: Better Nether Fortress Loot
description: Improves the loot found in Nether Fortress chests.
body:
# Introduction
You enter a dangerous Fortress within The Nether, and you finally find a chest to loot. Upon opening it, the only items to obtain are two Saddles and some Nether Wart. 😒

If you're disappointed with current Nether Fortress loot, then this Datapack is for you! It improves the current loot pool but stays close to Vanilla as possible while introducing exciting loot to find.

# Information
✅ Loot Table has been completely overhauled. _(see Changelog for more information)_

**⚠️ Free to use in Modpacks when credited. ⚠️**
